name: Arizona Chuck Wagon Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Dried navy or pinto beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick over beans and rinse well. Combine beans and water in a large kettle. Bring to boiling; cover; cook 2 minutes. Remove from heat and let stand 1 hour. Then pour into slow cooker.
2. Brown salt pork in a large skillet; remove with a slotted spoon to the cooker. Sauté onion, garlic, and green pepper in pan drippings; remove with a slotted spoon to the cooker. Brown beef, a few pieces at a time, in pan drippings; remove to the cooker with a slotted spoon. Stir in salt, oregano, red pepper, cumin, and tomato sauce. Add more water, if necessary, to bring liquid level above beans.
3. Cook on low for 10 hours or on high for 6 hours, or until beans are tender.
